title: Ospex Run Scenario Matrix
description: Per-run scenario matrix for live canary runs. Version 2 is the first schema-backed shape; earlier scenario-matrix.json files predate this schema and are grandfathered. See docs/mm-live-canary-evidence.md.

artifactId.description: Must equal the run artifact directory name.

runClass.description: Run flavor this matrix instantiates, for example mm-live-canary.

id.description: Stable kebab-case scenario identifier, unique within the matrix.

status.description: Scenario-level result. This is local to the scenario row; artifact-level status keeps its own controlled vocabulary.

evidence.description: Path to the supporting sanitized evidence file, relative to the artifact directory. Null only when status is deferred, not_run, or not_applicable.

notes.description: Factual, test-scoped notes. Team references follow the Team Identity Rule: actual team name plus home/away role.
